name: Crown Equity Holdings, Inc.
business: Crown Equity Holdings, Inc. provides consulting services to companies and individuals regarding corporate structure and operations, as well as public relations and news dissemination. It also offers Internet media-driven advertising services and search engine optimization to companies seeking market awareness.
sellsTo: domestic and global companies seeking to become public entities in the United States

exposures.sentence: The Company provides various consulting services to companies and individuals dealing with corporate structure and operations globally.

The Company offers Internet media-driven advertising services, which cover and connect a wide range of marketing specialties, as well as search engine optimization for clients interested in online media awareness.
